adverse_events.outcome: Required Intervention to Prevent Permanent Impairment/Damage
adverse_events.event_description: Osteonecrosis of the jaw (ONJ) developed after dental extraction. Exposed necrotic bone in mandible confirmed on CT. Surgical debridement required.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Recent molar extraction 1 month prior. Corticosteroid use (prednisone). Vitamin D deficiency.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Recent molar extraction 1 month prior. Corticosteroid use (prednisone). Vitamin D deficiency.

adverse_events.outcome: Other Serious or Important Medical Events
adverse_events.event_description: Drug-induced lupus erythematosus confirmed. Patient presented with arthralgias, rash, and positive ANA. Symptoms began 4 months after initiating therapy.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Slow acetylator genotype. No family history of lupus. Non-smoker.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Slow acetylator genotype. No family history of lupus. Non-smoker.

adverse_events.event_description: Stevens-Johnson Syndrome developed 2 weeks after starting medication. Widespread skin blistering, mucosal involvement, and high fever (103°F). ICU admission required.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: No prior drug allergies. HLA-B*1502 status unknown. On valproic acid concurrently.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: No prior drug allergies. HLA-B*1502 status unknown. On valproic acid concurrently.

adverse_events.event_description: Rhabdomyolysis confirmed by elevated CPK. Patient presented with severe muscle pain, weakness, and dark urine after dose increase 3 weeks prior.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Concurrent gemfibrozil use. Mild renal impairment. Former smoker.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Concurrent gemfibrozil use. Mild renal impairment. Former smoker.

adverse_events.event_description: Severe hypoglycemia episode requiring emergency glucagon administration. Blood glucose dropped to 28 mg/dL. Patient lost consciousness briefly.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Missed lunch before taking medication. Renal insufficiency (CrCl 42 mL/min). Exercise-intensive lifestyle.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Renal insufficiency (CrCl 42 mL/min)

adverse_events.event_description: Acute liver failure symptoms emerged 6 weeks after therapy initiation. Jaundice, abdominal pain, and significantly elevated liver enzymes noted. Liver biopsy showed drug-induced hepatic necrosis.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Slow acetylator. Social alcohol use. No prior liver disease.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Slow acetylator. Social alcohol use. No prior liver disease.

adverse_events.event_description: Intracranial hemorrhage (subdural hematoma) after minor fall. On anticoagulation therapy. Neurosurgical intervention required. Prolonged ICU stay.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Fall risk due to orthostatic hypotension. Concurrent aspirin 81mg. Renal insufficiency (eGFR 28).

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Fall risk due to orthostatic hypotension. Concurrent aspirin 81mg. Renal insufficiency (eGFR 28).

adverse_events.event_description: Patient experienced QT prolongation detected on ECG monitoring 3 days into treatment. Complained of palpitations and near-syncope. Drug was immediately discontinued.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: History of prolonged QT syndrome. Concurrent use of metoprolol.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: History of prolonged QT syndrome. Concurrent use of metoprolol.

adverse_events.event_description: Gastrointestinal bleeding developed after 2 weeks of therapy. Hematemesis noted. Hospitalized for 5 days.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Peptic ulcer disease – history. Chronic kidney disease Stage 2. Non-smoker.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Peptic ulcer disease – history. Chronic kidney disease Stage 2. Non-smoker.

adverse_events.event_description: Severe allergic reaction with hives and difficulty breathing 30 minutes after first dose. Patient required emergency epinephrine injection.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Known allergy to ACE inhibitors – not on prior records. No prior adverse drug reactions documented.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Known allergy to ACE inhibitors – not on prior records. No prior adverse drug reactions documented.

adverse_events.event_description: Nephrogenic diabetes insipidus with severe polyuria (10+ L/day) and hypernatremia after 2 years of therapy.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: NSAIDs used concurrently (ibuprofen). Low-sodium diet recently started. No prior renal disease.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: No prior renal disease

adverse_events.event_description: Aplastic anemia confirmed after routine CBC showed pancytopenia. Bone marrow biopsy showed markedly hypocellular marrow. Patient required transfusions and eventual stem cell transplant.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Folate supplementation was NOT co-prescribed. Renal function borderline (CrCl 48). No NSAID use.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Folate supplementation was NOT co-prescribed. Renal function borderline (CrCl 48). No NSAID use.

adverse_events.event_description: Severe exfoliative dermatitis (toxic epidermal necrolysis — TEN) covering 40% body surface area. ICU admission, wound care, IV fluids, pain management required.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: HLA-B*5801 positive (not checked prior to prescribing). Renal impairment — dose not adjusted.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: HLA-B*5801 positive (not checked prior to prescribing). Renal impairment — dose not adjusted.

adverse_events.event_description: Severe peripheral neuropathy with burning pain and numbness in bilateral lower extremities after 6 months of therapy. EMG confirmed axonal neuropathy.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: CD4 count 320 cells/uL. Diabetic - confounds neuropathy risk. Alcohol use (social).

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: CD4 count 320 cells/uL. Diabetic - confounds neuropathy risk. Alcohol use (social).

adverse_events.event_description: Serotonin syndrome developed after combining medications. Symptoms included agitation, diaphoresis, myoclonus, and hyperthermia (104.2°F). ICU admitted.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Concurrently prescribed sertraline 100mg for depression. History of opioid use disorder, in remission.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Concurrently prescribed sertraline 100mg for depression. History of opioid use disorder, in remission.

adverse_events.event_description: Refractory hypotension and shock developed 2 hours after IV infusion. Required vasopressors, fluid resuscitation, and 3-day ICU stay. Suspected anaphylaxis.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Renal impairment at baseline

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Renal impairment at baseline

adverse_events.event_description: Suicidal ideation and behavioral changes reported 2 weeks after dose increase. Patient disclosed plan to parents; hospitalized for psychiatric evaluation and safety monitoring.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Pediatric patient under 18 — black box warning applicable. Family history of depression. No prior suicidal ideation.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Pediatric patient under 18 — black box warning applicable. Family history of depression. No prior suicidal ideation.

adverse_events.event_description: Agranulocytosis confirmed after presenting with fever, sore throat, and mouth ulcers. ANC dropped to 0.1 K/uL. Hospitalized on reverse isolation for 11 days with IV antibiotics.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Weekly CBC monitoring was being done per REMS protocol. No prior blood dyscrasias. Non-smoker.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Weekly CBC monitoring was being done per REMS protocol. No prior blood dyscrasias. Non-smoker.

adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: N/A

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: N/A

adverse_events.event_description: Pulmonary fibrosis detected on high-resolution CT scan after 14 months of treatment. Persistent dry cough and progressive dyspnea reported for 3 months prior to imaging.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Cumulative bleomycin dose exceeded 400 units. Non-smoker. Prior radiation to chest.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Cumulative bleomycin dose exceeded 400 units. Non-smoker. Prior radiation to chest.

adverse_events.event_description: Angioedema of tongue and lips requiring emergency airway management and intubation. Occurred 3 hours after first dose.
adverse_events.medical_history_preexisting: Previous intolerance to lisinopril (cough). African American male – higher risk for ACE-I angioedema.

medical_history.preexisting_conditions: Previous intolerance to lisinopril (cough). African American male – higher risk for ACE-I angioedema.
